function_v0.doc:
Initialize global configuration (one-time).

Parameters:
- `contract_admin`: global admin address (must sign).
- `default_issuer_did`: default issuer DID metadata (string).
function_v0.name: initialize

function_v0.doc:
Set global contract admin (admin-only).

Parameters:
- `new_admin`: new admin address.
function_v0.name: set_contract_admin

function_v0.doc:
Configure global fee (admin-only).

Parameters:
- `token_contract`: Soroban token contract address used for charging.
- `fee_dest`: destination address to receive fees.
- `fee_amount`: amount to transfer on each issuance/store (i128).
function_v0.name: set_fee_config

function_v0.doc:
Enable/disable fee charging (admin-only).

Parameters:
- `enabled`: `true` to charge fees on issuance, `false` otherwise.
function_v0.name: set_fee_enabled

function_v0.doc:
Sets fee for admin role (admin-only).

Parameters:
- `fee_amount`: fee amount in i128 (typically 0 for admin).
function_v0.name: set_fee_admin

function_v0.doc:
Sets fee for standard role (admin-only).

Parameters:
- `fee_amount`: fee amount in i128 (typically 1 USDC = 1000000 for standard).
function_v0.name: set_fee_standard

function_v0.doc:
Sets fee for early role (admin-only).

Parameters:
- `fee_amount`: fee amount in i128 (typically 0.4 USDC = 400000 for early).
function_v0.name: set_fee_early

function_v0.doc:
Sets custom fee for a specific issuer address (admin-only).

Parameters:
- `issuer`: issuer address to set custom fee for.
- `fee_amount`: fee amount in i128.
function_v0.name: set_fee_custom

function_v0.doc: Gets fee for admin role (public read-only).
function_v0.name: get_fee_admin

function_v0.doc: Gets fee for standard role (public read-only).
function_v0.name: get_fee_standard

function_v0.doc: Gets fee for early role (public read-only).
function_v0.name: get_fee_early

function_v0.doc: Gets custom fee for a specific issuer address (public read-only).
function_v0.name: get_fee_custom

function_v0.doc:
Upgrade contract WASM (admin-only).

Parameters:
- `new_wasm_hash`: hash of the new WASM code.
function_v0.name: upgrade

function_v0.doc: Return the deployed contract version string.
function_v0.name: version

function_v0.doc:
Returns fee configuration status (public read-only, no signature required).

Returns:
- `enabled`: whether fees are enabled.
- `configured`: whether fee configuration is set (token_contract, fee_dest, fee_amount are all set).
- `token_contract`: token contract address (if configured).
- `fee_dest`: fee destination address (if configured).
- `fee_amount`: fee amount (if configured).
function_v0.name: fee_config

function_v0.doc:
Create/initialize a vault for an owner (one-time per owner).

Parameters:
- `owner`: vault owner address (must sign).
- `did_uri`: DID URI metadata for the owner.
function_v0.name: create_vault

function_v0.doc:
Set the per-vault admin (current vault admin must sign).

Parameters:
- `owner`: vault owner address (selects which vault).
- `new_admin`: new admin address for that vault.
function_v0.name: set_vault_admin

function_v0.doc:
Replace the full authorized issuer list for a vault (vault admin-only).

Parameters:
- `owner`: vault owner address.
- `issuers`: list of issuer addresses allowed to issue into this vault.
function_v0.name: authorize_issuers

function_v0.doc:
Add a single authorized issuer to a vault (vault admin-only).

Parameters:
- `owner`: vault owner address.
- `issuer_addr`: issuer address to authorize.
function_v0.name: authorize_issuer

function_v0.doc:
Remove a single issuer from the authorized issuer list (vault admin-only).

Parameters:
- `owner`: vault owner address.
- `issuer_addr`: issuer address to revoke.
function_v0.name: revoke_issuer

function_v0.doc:
Revoke a vault (vault admin-only). Blocks future writes.

Parameters:
- `owner`: vault owner address.
function_v0.name: revoke_vault

function_v0.doc:
List VC IDs stored in a vault.

Parameters:
- `owner`: vault owner address.
function_v0.name: list_vc_ids

function_v0.doc:
Get a VC payload from a vault (public read).

Parameters:
- `owner`: vault owner address.
- `vc_id`: VC identifier.
function_v0.name: get_vc

function_v0.doc:
Verify a VC status via the issuance registry (public read).

Parameters:
- `owner`: vault owner address (used only to check that the VC exists in that vault).
- `vc_id`: VC identifier.
function_v0.name: verify_vc

function_v0.doc:
Move a VC from one owner's vault to another.

Parameters:
- `from_owner`: origin vault owner (must sign).
- `to_owner`: destination vault owner.
- `vc_id`: VC identifier to move.
- `issuer_addr`: issuer address that must be authorized in `from_owner` vault (no signature required).
function_v0.name: push

function_v0.doc:
Issue a VC: stores payload in vault + writes issuance status = `valid`.

Parameters:
- `owner`: vault owner that will receive the VC.
- `vc_id`: VC identifier (application-defined).
- `vc_data`: VC payload (ciphertext only).
- `vault_contract`: kept for backwards-compat; must be this contract.
- `issuer_addr`: issuer address (must sign and be authorized in owner's vault).
- `issuer_did`: issuer DID metadata.
- `fee_override`: Fee amount to override default/role-based fee. If `0`, uses global fee.
If `> 0`, uses that amount directly.
function_v0.name: issue

function_v0.doc:
Revoke a VC by ID.

Parameters:
- `vc_id`: VC identifier.
- `date`: revocation date string (recommended ISO-8601).
function_v0.name: revoke

function_v0.doc:
Migrate legacy storage layouts.

Parameters:
- `owner`: `Some(owner)` migrates that owner's vault legacy VCs; `None` migrates legacy issuance registry.
function_v0.name: migrate

udt_error_enum_v0.doc:
Contract error codes.

Notes:
- Soroban exposes errors as `Error(Contract, #<code>)`.
- Keep these codes stable once deployed.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: ContractError

cases.doc: The resource/namespace you are trying to initialize already exists.
cases.name: AlreadyInitialized

cases.doc: The given issuer is not authorized for this vault.
cases.name: IssuerNotAuthorized

cases.doc: The given issuer is already authorized for this vault.
cases.name: IssuerAlreadyAuthorized

cases.doc: The vault is revoked; write operations are blocked.
cases.name: VaultRevoked

cases.doc: Migration has already been executed (nothing to migrate).
cases.name: VCSAlreadyMigrated

cases.doc: VC does not exist (status registry or vault lookup).
cases.name: VCNotFound

cases.doc: VC is already revoked (cannot revoke twice).
cases.name: VCAlreadyRevoked

cases.doc: Vault is not initialized for this owner.
cases.name: VaultNotInitialized

cases.doc: `vault_contract` parameter is not this contract (kept only for backwards-compat).
cases.name: InvalidVaultContract

udt_union_v0.doc:
Unified storage keys.

Instance storage:
- Small config and per-owner vault metadata.
Persistent storage:
- VC payloads, VC id indexes, issuer lists, and issuance status registry.
udt_union_v0.name: DataKey

udt_struct_v0.doc: Fee configuration status (read-only public function return type).
udt_struct_v0.name: FeeConfig

fields.doc: Whether fee configuration is set (token_contract, fee_dest, fee_amount are all set).
fields.name: configured

udt_union_v0.doc: Status registry entry for a VC ID.
udt_union_v0.name: VCStatus

void_v0.doc: VC exists and is currently valid.
void_v0.name: Valid

void_v0.doc: VC does not exist in the registry.
void_v0.name: Invalid

tuple_v0.doc: VC was revoked at the given ISO-8601 date string.
tuple_v0.name: Revoked

udt_struct_v0.doc: Verifiable Credential stored in a vault.\n\n`data` is expected to be **ciphertext** (encrypted off-chain) or a safe reference.
udt_struct_v0.name: VerifiableCredential

fields.doc: Issuance contract that can verify/revoke the VC status.
fields.name: issuance_contract
